summary: Iteration 50 - Avatar Edit Feature Testing. All 9 features tested successfully via Playwright UI testing. Avatar gallery Edit button (pen icon) appears on hover, Edit modal shows correct title 'Edit Avatar' vs 'Create Avatar' for new avatars, modal footer displays dual buttons 'Save as New' and 'Update' when editing existing avatars, Update button modifies existing avatar without creating new, Save as New button clones avatar and adds new entry to gallery, Delete button (X) visible on hover, Zoom button opens preview modal, Avatar selection (click to select) works correctly.

FEATURE_1_edit_button_on_hover.details: Edit button (pen icon) appears on hover for each avatar thumbnail in gallery

FEATURE_2_edit_modal_pre_populated.details: Clicking Edit button opens avatar customization modal with avatar's data pre-populated (image, clothing options shown)

FEATURE_3_modal_title_edit_vs_customize.details: Modal title shows 'Edit Avatar' when editing existing avatar, 'Create Avatar' for new avatars

FEATURE_4_dual_buttons_when_editing.details: When editing, modal footer shows TWO buttons: 'Save as New' (+ icon) and 'Update' (check icon)

FEATURE_5_update_modifies_existing.details: Clicking 'Update' updates existing avatar in gallery without creating a new one. Avatar count remained same (2) after update.

FEATURE_6_save_as_new_clones.details: Clicking 'Save as New' clones avatar and adds new entry to gallery. Avatar count increased from 1 to 2 after 'Save as New'. Toast message 'Avatar saved as new!' confirmed.

FEATURE_7_delete_button_works.details: Delete button (X) visible on hover for avatar thumbnails

FEATURE_8_zoom_button_works.details: Zoom button opens preview modal with avatar image and download/close buttons

FEATURE_9_avatar_selection_works.details: Clicking avatar thumbnail selects it (gold border highlight with checkmark)

seed_data_creation: Test avatars seeded via localStorage (key: agentzz_avatars) with test_avatar_1 and test_avatar_2 for UI verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 50: All Avatar Edit features verified working. Route: /marketing/studio. Key test-ids: edit-avatar-{id}, zoom-avatar-{id}, delete-avatar-{id}, save-avatar-as-new-btn, save-avatar-final-btn, avatar-modal. Modal shows 'Edit Avatar' title when editingAvatarId is set, otherwise 'Create Avatar' or 'Customize Avatar'. Dual footer buttons (Save as New, Update) appear only when editing existing avatar. Avatar data stored in localStorage key 'agentzz_avatars'.

mocked_apis.note: Avatar data stored in localStorage, no backend API required for basic avatar CRUD
